title: Add ingestion staleness alerting with operator-visible thresholds

cycle.message: Ingestor cycle freshness is 1m old (threshold: 30m). Last status: running.

offers.message: No offers timestamp found; ingestor offers freshness cannot be proven.

runtime_proof.notes: Ingestor was just restarted. Cycle is fresh (1m). Offers will populate on next ingestor cycle. Results stale reflects no incoming settlement data from SGO — expected given scanner is quiesced. Alert script correctly detects and surfaces staleness with structured JSON. Exit code 1 on any CRITICAL threshold breach is correct behavior per acceptance criteria.

acceptance_criteria.recovery_signal: level OK when age < threshold — emitted on every run

known_issues: Results freshness is stale (782m). This is a pre-existing operational condition: SGO results ingest depends on game settlement data which is not flowing while scanner is quiesced (DEBT-003). Not a defect in the alert implementation.
Delivered as part of multi-issue PR #303 (runtime truth spine) alongside UTV2-596/599/614/616/617. Work is attributable to the staleness alerting acceptance criteria.
